'''pachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swervingly|swervingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swervingly|swervingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pachate|pachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pachatesher|pachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachatesherĂ«m|pachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pachatero|pachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pachateshĂ«|pachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachateshĂ«m|pachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipachatero|gokipachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipachateshĂ«|gokipachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachateshĂ«m|gokipachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopachankerom|gopachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopachankeshĂ«|gopachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopachankeshĂ«m|gopachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopachankeya|gopachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pachaterom|pachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachatemu|pachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pachateya|pachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipachaterom|gokipachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachatemu|gokipachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipachateya|gokipachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pachachate|pachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pachachatesher|pachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachachatesherĂ«m|pachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pachachatero|pachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pachachateshĂ«|pachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachachateshĂ«m|pachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipachachatero|gokipachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipachachateshĂ«|gokipachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachachateshĂ«m|gokipachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopachachankerom|gopachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopachachankeshĂ«|gopachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopachachankeshĂ«m|gopachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopachachankeya|gopachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pachachaterom|pachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachachatemu|pachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pachachateya|pachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipachachaterom|gokipachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachachatemu|gokipachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipachachateya|gokipachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠte|pĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠtesher|pĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠtero|pĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠchĂŠtero|gokipĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠterom|pĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠtemu|pĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠchĂŠteya|pĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠchĂŠterom|gokipĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠchĂŠteya|gokipĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafchafte|pafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafchaftesher|pafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafchaftesherĂ«m|pafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafchaftero|pafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafchafteshĂ«|pafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafchafteshĂ«m|pafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafchaftero|gokipafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafchafteshĂ«|gokipafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafchafteshĂ«m|gokipafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafchafnkerom|gopafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafchafnkeshĂ«|gopafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafchafnkeshĂ«m|gopafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafchafnkeya|gopafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafchafterom|pafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafchaftemu|pafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafchafteya|pafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafchafterom|gokipafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafchaftemu|gokipafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafchafteya|gokipafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
